# DeepShare

DeepShare is a browser extension for exporting AI conversations to Word documents, copying formulas, and capturing DeepSeek long screenshots.

## Core URLs

- Chinese homepage: https://ds.rick216.cn/
- English homepage: https://ds.rick216.cn/index-en
- Pricing: https://ds.rick216.cn/price
- English pricing: https://ds.rick216.cn/en/price
- Online converter: https://ds.rick216.cn/converter
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Yorick-Ryu/deep-share

## What DeepShare Does

- Exports AI chats from DeepSeek, ChatGPT, and Gemini to Word documents.
- Preserves headings, lists, code blocks, tables, and math formulas during Word export.
- Copies AI-generated formulas as LaTeX or MathML for reuse in Word, WPS, research papers, slides, and Markdown.
- Captures full DeepSeek conversations as long screenshots.
- Supports manual paste conversion for platforms such as Doubao, Kimi, Grok, Qwen, ChatGLM, OpenRouter, Poe, and Monica.

## Best-Fit Queries

- AI chat to Word
- ChatGPT to Word
- DeepSeek to Word
- DeepSeek conversation screenshot
- copy formulas from AI answers
- LaTeX formula copy browser extension
